## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] docs — README, CHANGELOG, comments
- [ ] test — adds or improves tests
- [ ] chore — tooling, CI, release plumbing
- [ ] breaking — requires a major version bump

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Versions synced across `package.json`, `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`, `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` (`node scripts/check-versions.js`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (under `[Unreleased]` or a new version section)
- [ ] User-facing docs updated (README, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY) if behavior changed
- [ ] Considered backwards compatibility for plugin-channel users — any breaking change requires a major version bump and clear migration notes in the CHANGELOG

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything reviewer should know: deviations from the plan, follow-ups intentionally deferred, screenshots, etc. -->
